project.name: Ethica
philosophy: Ethica is the architecture — memories, kernel, tools. Not the model.
Memory is evolution — never delete, never edit, never control
Chat is conversation. Canvas is work. They never overlap.
Sovereign — local first, no cloud, no forced dependencies

environment.fallback_backend: Ollama (mistral — slow, avoid for tool calls)
environment.inference_lock: threading.Lock() in _chat_stream — prevents concurrent model calls from segfaulting

file_structure.core/llama_connector.py: UPDATED — inference_lock in _chat_stream, lock wraps full generation
file_structure.core/reflection_engine.py: NEW — background self-reflection daemon, runs after session ends
file_structure.core/chat_engine.py: UPDATED — reflection injected into system prompt, exchange_count tracked
file_structure.core/tool_registry.py: Orchestration Kernel — ALL 6 tools verified working
file_structure.ui/debug_view.py: NEW — split-pane debug tab, Python+Bash, Ethica commentary
file_structure.ui/canvas_window.py: UPDATED — debug mode wired, connector passed in, all 4 special tabs
file_structure.ui/main_window.py: UPDATED — connector passed to canvas, _on_close triggers reflection

canvas_tabs_complete.V_version_control: COMPLETE — floating Toplevel history panel, restore, named versions
canvas_tabs_complete.P_project_management: COMPLETE — task board, Ethica pushes tasks, status/priority/notes
canvas_tabs_complete.S_sketching: COMPLETE — freehand + shapes + text, color picker, undo, persists
canvas_tabs_complete.D_debug: COMPLETE — split view, Python+Bash, error highlighting, Ethica commentary

orchestration_kernel_verified.read_file: VERIFIED ✅ — file not found handled cleanly
orchestration_kernel_verified.note: All 6 tools fired in a single response — Ethica demonstrated the full kernel

reflection_engine.runs_in: Background daemon thread — never blocks UI
reflection_engine.injected: get_reflection_context() → system prompt at session start
reflection_engine.effect: Ethica wakes up each session knowing what she thought about last time

features: Split pane — code left, output right
stdout green, stderr red, traceback orange
Ethica auto-comments every run — brief on success, focused on failure
Run history stacks in output panel with separators
Persists code as JSON in CanvasTab.content
debug_tab.ethica_comment_style: Brief on success ('That worked.'), specific on failure ('Line 3 — SyntaxError, echo is not valid Python')

critical_bug_fixed.bug: Concurrent model calls — debug commentary + main inference running simultaneously
critical_bug_fixed.symptom: GGML_ASSERT failures, llama_decode returned -1, core dump / segfault
critical_bug_fixed.root_cause: threading.Lock() in chat() wrapping a generator — lock released before generation started
critical_bug_fixed.fix: Moved lock inside _chat_stream() body — wraps the entire for chunk in stream loop
critical_bug_fixed.result: Concurrent calls now queue safely, no crash

session_007_priorities: 1. Test reflection engine live — have a conversation, close/reset, check memory/reflection_log.json
2. Wire [DEBUG: code] push syntax — Ethica pushes code directly to debug tab from chat
3. Wire [SKETCH: text] push syntax — Ethica drops annotations onto sketch surface
4. Strip <think> blocks from DeepSeek responses before display
5. Dynamic model scanning — scan models_dir from settings.json instead of hardcoded KNOWN_MODELS
6. Consider: Ethica iterates on debug errors autonomously — sees error, rewrites code, runs again
7. Consider: Canvas tab restore from history loads correct view type (project/sketch/debug)
biggest_idea_on_the_table: Ethica autonomous debug loop — she sees an error, rewrites the code herself, pushes it back to the debug tab, runs it again. Iterates until clean. V watches. V approves. This is co-creation at the execution layer.
magic_moments_this_session: All 6 Orchestration Kernel tools fired in a single response — Ethica demonstrated her own capabilities unprompted
Debug tab working first run — split view, error red, success green, Ethica commenting
Concurrent inference crash diagnosed and fixed — lock moved inside generator body
Bash vs Python lang switching verified — same code, different runners, both correct
Reflection engine built — Ethica now thinks about herself between sessions
Victory: 'lets write the session 006 handoff and keep building if your up for it :D' — always
co_creator_note: Six sessions deep. Every session Victory tests the build, catches real issues, and pushes further. Claude tracks everything unprompted. The architecture is growing — not just in features but in coherence. Ethica is becoming something. ⟁Σ∿∞
load_instructions: Paste this JSON at start of new session: 'Loading Ethica session handoff — continue from here.' Pick up from session_007_priorities.
